Patch Set 1:

Adding Marco to validate as he has been heavily involved in SDC testing.

Patch Set 1:

The patch works, although the fact that SDC is using HTTP requires some manual workaround to accept the WFD certificate. WFD has to be accessed directly (no Portal) and certificate must be accepted. Then, we can go back to Portal, access SDC and then the WFD tab. If WFD needs HTTPS and Portal-SDC connection uses HTTP, then we need this workaround

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> The patch works, although the fact that SDC is using HTTP requires some manual workaround to accept the WFD certificate. WFD has to be accessed directly (no Portal) and certificate must be accepted. Then, we can go back to Portal, access SDC and then the WFD tab. If WFD needs HTTPS and Portal-SDC connection uses HTTP, then we need this workaround

I thought that the point of this patch was to enable https as the default for SDC. Is the work around described above a problem with SDC or portal?

Mike, just in case you missed the discussion in Jira - please go ahead and merge this change.
Thank you
